name: @oxfoxlion/shao-cli-tools
description: 邵的個人終端機工具包

scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && npm publish --access public && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && npm publish --access public && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major && npm publish --access public && git push && git push --tags
